# Name clearance — MeiCaixa
Verdict: PROCEED-WITH-CAUTION.
- "Caixa" collides with Caixa Econômica Federal (major BR state bank) in a financial context — confusion/dilution risk.
- "caixa" is descriptive (cash register). Distinctiveness rests on the "Mei" + composite mark.
Recommendation: distinctive logotype, avoid bank-adjacent blue/visual cues, register composite mark at INPI; keep a coined fallback.
Web-grounded: yes — INPI/Caixa brand check, 2026-06-25.
